sub_modules.conv1d_shift_window: Combinational shift-register window update that appends the newest serial sample.
sub_modules.conv1d_coeff_rom: Combinational coefficient source for supported odd kernel sizes, including the 5-tap Gaussian benchmark kernel.
sub_modules.conv1d_mac: Combinational multiply-accumulate over the current stencil window and coefficient vector.
sub_modules.conv1d_output_scale: Combinational fixed-point output scaler that divides the accumulated sum by 16 through truncating right shift.
